query.rawSql: SELECT code AS __value FROM branches WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY code

targets.rawSql: SELECT d.status AS value FROM devices d JOIN branches b ON d.branch_id = b.id WHERE b.code = '$branch' AND d.equipment_type = 'NETWORK_LINK' LIMIT 1

SELECT m.cpu_usage_percent AS value FROM device_metrics m JOIN devices d ON m.device_id = d.id JOIN branches b ON d.branch_id = b.id WHERE b.code = '$branch' AND d.equipment_type = 'NETWORK_LINK' ORDER BY m.collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT m.ram_usage_percent AS value FROM device_metrics m JOIN devices d ON m.device_id = d.id JOIN branches b ON d.branch_id = b.id WHERE b.code = '$branch' AND d.equipment_type = 'NETWORK_LINK' ORDER BY m.collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT m.response_time_ms AS value FROM device_metrics m JOIN devices d ON m.device_id = d.id JOIN branches b ON d.branch_id = b.id WHERE b.code = '$branch' AND d.equipment_type = 'NETWORK_LINK' ORDER BY m.collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT d.hostname AS "Hostname", d.ip_address AS "IP", d.status AS "Estado", m.router_sys_desc AS "Descripcion" FROM devices d JOIN branches b ON d.branch_id = b.id LEFT JOIN device_metrics m ON m.device_id = d.id WHERE b.code = '$branch' AND d.equipment_type = 'NETWORK_LINK' ORDER BY m.collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT m.collected_at AS time, 'CPU' AS metric, m.cpu_usage_percent AS value FROM device_metrics m JOIN devices d ON m.device_id = d.id JOIN branches b ON d.branch_id = b.id WHERE b.code = '$branch' AND d.equipment_type = 'NETWORK_LINK' AND $__timeFilter(m.collected_at) AND m.cpu_usage_percent IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

SELECT m.collected_at AS time, 'RAM' AS metric, m.ram_usage_percent AS value FROM device_metrics m JOIN devices d ON m.device_id = d.id JOIN branches b ON d.branch_id = b.id WHERE b.code = '$branch' AND d.equipment_type = 'NETWORK_LINK' AND $__timeFilter(m.collected_at) AND m.ram_usage_percent IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

SELECT m.collected_at AS time, 'Inbound' AS metric, m.inbound_traffic_kbps::FLOAT AS value FROM device_metrics m JOIN devices d ON m.device_id = d.id JOIN branches b ON d.branch_id = b.id WHERE b.code = '$branch' AND d.equipment_type = 'NETWORK_LINK' AND $__timeFilter(m.collected_at) AND m.inbound_traffic_kbps IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

SELECT m.collected_at AS time, 'Outbound' AS metric, m.outbound_traffic_kbps::FLOAT AS value FROM device_metrics m JOIN devices d ON m.device_id = d.id JOIN branches b ON d.branch_id = b.id WHERE b.code = '$branch' AND d.equipment_type = 'NETWORK_LINK' AND $__timeFilter(m.collected_at) AND m.outbound_traffic_kbps IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

SELECT m.collected_at AS time, 'Latencia' AS metric, m.response_time_ms AS value FROM device_metrics m JOIN devices d ON m.device_id = d.id JOIN branches b ON d.branch_id = b.id WHERE b.code = '$branch' AND d.equipment_type = 'NETWORK_LINK' AND $__timeFilter(m.collected_at) AND m.response_time_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

SELECT a.severity AS "Severidad", a.alert_type AS "Tipo", a.title AS "Titulo", a.status AS "Estado", a.opened_at AS "Abierta", a.resolved_at AS "Resuelta", a.message AS "Detalle" FROM alerts a JOIN branches b ON a.branch_id = b.id WHERE b.code = '$branch' AND a.opened_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY a.opened_at DESC LIMIT 100
